p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 repo CI/CD pass_to_pass tests: test_repo_python_syntax (validates all Python files parse without errors), test_repo_cmake_structure (validates cmake block structure is valid), test_repo_flashmla_py_imports (validates torch imports and dispatch), test_repo_cmake_git_tag_valid (validates GIT_TAG format is a valid 40-char hex commit hash). Docker environment is minimal (no torch/cmake/pre-commit), so tests focus on static analysis. All 15 tests pass after gold fix (9 original + 4 new p2p).

validate.notes: All 4 validation checks passed: Docker build OK, NOP test reward=0 (6 f2p tests correctly failing on broken base), Gold test reward=1 (all 15 tests pass after fix), Rubric judge ICR=1.0 (rubric is empty, no rules to check)
